description:
AI-powered next-generation cross-platform multithreaded downloader.

A cross-platform fluent-design AI-boost multi-threaded downloader built with Python.
Important
我们建议通过软件内的 设置 > 浏览器扩展 > 一键安装 的方式来更新最新的浏览器插件 (#390)
新增功能 🎉
- 新增首次启动引导，帮助新用户快速完成初始设置 (#583) By @XiaoYouChR
- 浏览器身份预设现在可按域名自动匹配，并支持自定义 TLS 指纹与 UA (#569) By @XiaoYouChR
- YouTube 支持手动导入 Cookie，并可接收浏览器扩展发送的 Cookie By @XiaoYouChR
- 已完成的任务现在会显示文件总大小，任务列表支持按大小排序 By @XiaoYouChR
- 已完成任务的文件可以直接从任务卡片拖出（Windows 使用 COM 拖动，体验更流畅）By @XiaoYouChR
- 任务列表支持框选多个任务 (#538) By @XiaoYouChR
- 下载任务在任意状态下均可修改文件选择 By @XiaoYouChR
功能优化 🔧
- 删除任务时「是否删除本地文件」的选项从设置页移至删除弹窗中，直接跟随选择框 By @XiaoYouChR
- N_m3u8DL-RE 更新至 v0.6.0 By @XiaoYouChR
- 优化运行时依赖下载，不再因 api.github.com 访问失败而无法安装 By @XiaoYouChR
问题修复 🐛
- 修复首次启动时搜索框偏移的问题 (#587) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 HuggingFace 文件选择功能失效及子目录 404 的问题 (#586) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 HuggingFace 和 Bilibili 多文件下载完成后提示文件不存在的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 HuggingFace 文件下载记录导致程序无法启动的问题 (#582) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复下载任务编辑参数页面为空的问题 (#585) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 M3U8 直播任务退出重启后仍显示为暂停中的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复未知大小的任务完成后卡片刷新崩溃的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复下载任务出错时错误信息在日志中无法正确打印的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复页面切换时的闪烁抖动问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复移动端设置页卡片宽度溢出屏幕的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
Important
We recommend updating the latest browser extension via Settings > Browser Extension > One-Click Install within the app (#390)
New Features 🎉
- Added a first-launch setup wizard to help new users get started quickly (#583) By @XiaoYouChR
- Browser identity presets now auto-match by domain, with support for custom TLS fingerprints and User-Agent (#569) By @XiaoYouChR
- YouTube now supports manually importing cookies and receiving cookies sent from the browser extension By @XiaoYouChR
- Completed tasks now display the total file size, and the task list supports sorting by size By @XiaoYouChR
- Completed task files can now be dragged directly out of the task card (Windows uses COM drag for a smoother experience) By @XiaoYouChR
- The task list now supports box-selecting multiple tasks (#538) By @XiaoYouChR
- File selection can now be modified regardless of task status By @XiaoYouChR
Improvements 🔧
- The "delete local file" option has been moved from Settings into the delete-task dialog, right next to the action selector By @XiaoYouChR
- N_m3u8DL-RE updated to v0.6.0 By @XiaoYouChR
- Improved runtime dependency downloads — installation no longer fails due to api.github.com being inaccessible By @XiaoYouChR
Bug Fixes 🐛
- Fixed the search box being misaligned on first launch (#587) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed HuggingFace file selection not working and subdirectory 404 errors (#586) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed HuggingFace and Bilibili multi-file downloads showing "file not found" after completion By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed HuggingFace download records preventing the app from launching (#582) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed the download task's edit parameters page being empty (#585) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed M3U8 live recording tasks still showing as "paused" after restarting the app By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed a crash when a task with unknown size finishes and the card refreshes By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed error messages not being printed correctly in logs when a download task fails By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed flickering when switching between pages By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed settings page cards overflowing the screen on mobile By @XiaoYouChR
Full Changelog: v4.1.0...v4.1.1
